goal: Move all inline Python dependencies from Dockerfile.tester and init_build.sh into properly named requirements.txt files, enabling consistent dependency management and pip-audit coverage.

tasks.name: Create tester requirements.txt
tasks.action: Create cluster/tester/requirements.txt containing the 9 packages currently inlined in Dockerfile.tester's `RUN pip install` block: pytest==8.3.4, pytest-asyncio==1.3.0, certifi==2026.2.25, fastapi==0.135.1, uvicorn==0.42.0, pydantic==2.12.5, requests==2.32.5, mcp==1.26.0, mcp-watchdog==0.1.9. Add a header comment explaining these are tester-server runtime + test-tooling deps.
tasks.verify: File exists at cluster/tester/requirements.txt with all 9 pinned packages. run_tests passes.
tasks.done: cluster/tester/requirements.txt exists with all 9 packages matching current Dockerfile.tester versions.

tasks.name: Update Dockerfile.tester to use requirements.txt
tasks.action: Replace the inline `RUN pip install --no-cache-dir pytest==... mcp-watchdog==0.1.9` block with: `COPY tester/requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt` followed by `RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /tmp/requirements.txt` (same pattern as Dockerfile.claude and Dockerfile.plan).
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. `docker-compose build tester-server` succeeds (verified by test-integration.sh build step).
tasks.done: Dockerfile.tester uses COPY+pip install -r pattern instead of inline packages.

tasks.name: Create dev requirements file for init_build.sh
tasks.action: Create requirements-dev.txt in the repo root containing the 10 packages currently inlined in init_build.sh: certifi==2026.2.25, fastapi==0.135.1, uvicorn==0.42.0, pydantic==2.12.5, pytest==8.3.4, httpx==0.28.1, requests==2.32.5, mcp==1.26.0, pytest-asyncio==1.3.0, mcp-watchdog==0.1.9. Add a header comment explaining these are local dev/test venv dependencies.
tasks.verify: File exists at requirements-dev.txt with all 10 pinned packages. run_tests passes.
tasks.done: requirements-dev.txt exists in repo root with all 10 packages matching current init_build.sh versions.

tasks.name: Update init_build.sh to use requirements-dev.txt
tasks.action: Replace the multi-line `pip install certifi==... mcp-watchdog==0.1.9` block with `pip install -r requirements-dev.txt`. Keep the `pip install --upgrade pip` line before it.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. Running `bash init_build.sh` in a clean venv installs all expected packages.
tasks.done: init_build.sh uses `pip install -r requirements-dev.txt` instead of inline packages.

tasks.name: Add tester pip-audit to test-integration.sh
tasks.action: In the pip-audit section (after the planner audit block around line 128), add a third block that audits `tester/requirements.txt` using the same docker-run pattern. Label it 'Scanning tester requirements...' with a matching success/failure message.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. Grep test-integration.sh for 'tester/requirements.txt' confirms the new audit block exists.
tasks.done: test-integration.sh has a pip-audit block for tester/requirements.txt alongside the existing agent and planner blocks.
